title: House of Vanar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''House of Vanar''' was a fashion design studio on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], founded by [[Vanar]]. They were famous for being chosen to submit a design for [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade's]] wedding dress by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], but lost the bid when Mara discarded their design. They claimed "minimal was maximal" in galactic fashion at the time; this philosophy resulted in a gown that was far too revealing for Mara's taste.

{{Loc-stub}}
